parameters.content:
### SCRAPE VIDEO IN YOUTUBE - ANALYZE VIDEO - GET THE IMAGE - MAKE POST (IMAGE + TEXT WITH THE LINK OF THE CHANNEL) - POST TO YOUTUBE, INSTAGRAM, FACEBOOK PAGE


# [Spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1KuxCw3LPw-qtgEe3oqIq0iuwy79YIiru3uku2WbzHus/edit?usp=sharing)

nodes.name: Get row(s) in sheet in Google Sheets

parameters.pythonCode:
from datetime import datetime
import random

now = datetime.now()
date_str = now.strftime("%m/%d/%Y")
time_str = now.strftime("%H:%M")

character = random.choice([
    "Cheerful Girl in Pink", 
    "Tiny Mermaid Girl", 
    "Adorable Elf Girl", 
    "Joyful Princess", 
    "Cute Wizard Girl", 
    "Playful School Girl"
])

Youtube_Channel_Url = "https://youtube.com/@algonovalabs?si=p6UJAPdolW5Mfdq5"
Youtube_Channel_name = "AlgoNova Labs"
Image_URL = _input.first().json.webViewLink
Youtube_Video_Url = f"https://www.youtube.com/shorts/{_('Get many videos').first().json.id.videoId}"

prompt = f"""
IMPORTANT:
You MUST use the exact YouTube video URL and channel URL provided below.
Do NOT modify them, do NOT guess them, do NOT generate new ones.

Video URL (use EXACTLY this):
{Youtube_Video_Url}

Channel URL (use EXACTLY this):
{Youtube_Channel_Url}

Create highly engaging posts for:
• Facebook
• Instagram
• X (Twitter) — max 280 characters, no images
• YouTube Community — must include both video + channel links

Theme: whimsical, magical, pastel, FOMO-driven like {Youtube_Channel_name}.  
Promote the new video magically.

Provide 5 creative variations per platform.
Each variation must:
1. Be short, magical, whimsical, and FOMO-driven.
2. Use emojis and interaction hooks.
3. Include BOTH the Video URL and Channel URL EXACTLY as given.
4. Be unique for every variation and platform.
5. X post must stay under 280 chars and NOT reference images.

OUTPUT FORMAT (MANDATORY):
Return ONLY valid JSON in this structure.
Use the FIRST variation of each platform as default:

{{
  "Date": "{date_str}",
  "Time": "{time_str}",
  "Facebook Post": "FIRST CREATIVE VARIATION HERE",
  "Instagram Post": "FIRST CREATIVE VARIATION HERE",
  "X Post": "FIRST CREATIVE VARIATION HERE (must include both links, <280 chars)",
  "Youtube Post": "FIRST CREATIVE VARIATION HERE. Watch till the end! {Youtube_Channel_name}: {Youtube_Channel_Url}",
  "Image URL": "{Image_URL}",
  "Status": "Ready to Post",
  "Category": "Community Engagement",
  "Notes": "Include 5+ creative variations per platform. Use hashtags #AlgoNovaMagic #PastelWorld #WhimsicalVibes."
}}

RULES:
- DO NOT change or create any YouTube links.
- Do NOT invent URLs.
- ONLY use the provided Video URL and Channel URL EXACTLY as given.
- Do NOT use asterisks (**), dashes (-), or Markdown-style symbols in any post.
- Output must be valid JSON without formatting symbols or markdown.
"""

return {'chatInput': prompt}

Video_Details = _input.first().json.content.parts[0].text

prompt = f"""
This is the Video Details: {Video_Details}

Create a cinematic pastel 3D render inspired by the video's magical theme. 
It must look professional, clean, and emotionally uplifting — with the same whimsical mood as:

"A cinematic 3D pastel render of a floating magical light above an enchanted meadow, surrounded by gentle sparkles and pastel petals. Soft glow, balanced composition, no faces, no text, no characters."

Now, come up with a **unique, creative variation** of that scene idea.
You may change:
- The main magical focus (e.g., glowing portal, floating island, crystal heart, enchanted flower, soft light waves, celestial pond)
- The setting (e.g., pastel clouds, garden, seaside, sky, forest, dream realm)
- The color palette (keep pastel but vary tone: mint, pink, lavender, baby blue, gold)
- The lighting mood (morning glow, twilight sparkle, gentle sunrise)

RULES:
- Always keep the pastel, cinematic, whimsical aesthetic.
- Keep the composition balanced and minimal.
- Include NO text, NO faces, NO characters.
- Avoid darkness, clutter, and harsh contrast.
- Output must feel visually premium, magical, and uniquely creative.

Goal: Each result should feel like a new chapter of the same whimsical world — different scene, same dreamlike energy.
"""

return {'prompt': prompt}

import json
import re

ai_output = items[0]['json']['output']

match = re.search(r'```json\s*(\{.*?\})\s*```', ai_output, re.DOTALL)

if match:
    json_str = match.group(1).strip()
else:
    match = re.search(r'(\{.*?\})', ai_output, re.DOTALL)
    if not match:
        raise ValueError("No JSON object found in AI output")
    json_str = match.group(1).strip()

parsed = json.loads(json_str)

return [{"json": parsed}]

snippet.title: Cozy Fox's Magical World: You WON'T Believe What Happens Next! ✨
snippet.description:
Step into an enchanting world where magic meets coziness! ✨🦊 This heartwarming video features an adorable fox on a whimsical journey through three captivating scenes you won't want to miss.

First, get lost in a fantastical nighttime landscape illuminated by a glowing full moon, vibrant autumn trees, and a charming cottage surrounded by magical polka-dotted mushrooms. Then, witness the ultimate cozy moment as our anthropomorphic fox sips a warm drink on a snow-dusted porch, closing its eyes in pure bliss (listen for the satisfying slurp!). Finally, join the playful fox in a bright autumn forest as it discovers a sparkling secret with a touch of its paw.

Perfect for relaxing, unwinding, or adding a sprinkle of magic to your day! Watch till the end to catch every magical detail.

If you loved this whimsical escape, please like this video, leave a comment telling us your favorite scene, and subscribe for more enchanting animations! We're always brewing up new magical adventures just for you.

#MagicalFox #CozyVibes #WhimsicalAnimation #AutumnMagic #EnchantedForest #CuteAnimals #RelaxingVideo #Fairytale

snippet.title: 🤯 Latte Art Magic?! This Anime Girl's Transformation Is UNBELIEVABLE! | Cyber Bunny YOU CAN'T MISS!
snippet.description:
Get ready for an animated journey like no other! Watch as our adorable pink-haired girl's simple cup of steaming coffee transforms from beautiful latte art into a high-tech circuit board design! But the magic doesn't stop there... ☕✨

Witness an EPIC glow-up as her outfit changes into a stunning white bunny costume, complete with futuristic glowing bunny ears and dazzling pink accents! The background morphs from a cozy indoor setting to a vibrant, futuristic city under a breathtaking pink sky. This is the ULTIMATE anime transformation you have to see to believe!
